# Lightfriend

> AI assistant for dumbphones. Access WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, email, calendar, web search, and more via SMS and voice calls — no apps, no smartphone required.

Lightfriend bridges the gap between minimalist dumbphones and essential digital services. Users interact entirely through SMS text messages and voice calls from any phone.

## Docs

- [How It Works](https://lightfriend.ai/faq): FAQ covering features, setup, privacy, and compatible phones
- [Pricing](https://lightfriend.ai/pricing): Plans from $19/month (Assistant) and $29/month (Autopilot)
- [Supported Countries](https://lightfriend.ai/supported-countries): 40+ countries with local or notification-only numbers
- [Bring Your Own Number](https://lightfriend.ai/bring-own-number): Use your own Twilio number in unsupported countries

## Blog

- [Light Phone 3 WhatsApp Guide](https://lightfriend.ai/light-phone-3-whatsapp-guide): Add WhatsApp to Light Phone 3 via Lightfriend
- [How to Switch to a Dumbphone](https://lightfriend.ai/how-to-switch-to-dumbphone): Complete guide for the dumbphone lifestyle
- [How to Read More Accidentally](https://lightfriend.ai/how-to-read-more-accidentally): How removing smartphone distractions leads to reading more

## Features

- [WhatsApp on Dumbphone](https://lightfriend.ai/features/whatsapp-dumbphone): Use WhatsApp without a smartphone via SMS
- [Telegram on Dumbphone](https://lightfriend.ai/features/telegram-dumbphone): Access Telegram from any basic phone
- [Signal on Dumbphone](https://lightfriend.ai/features/signal-dumbphone): Use Signal messenger on a dumbphone
- [Email via SMS](https://lightfriend.ai/features/email-sms): Read and send email from any phone
- [Calendar via SMS](https://lightfriend.ai/features/calendar-sms): Google Calendar on your dumbphone
- [Tesla SMS Control](https://lightfriend.ai/features/tesla-sms): Control your Tesla from any phone
- [AI Search via SMS](https://lightfriend.ai/features/ai-search-sms): Web search on a dumbphone
- [GPS Directions via SMS](https://lightfriend.ai/features/gps-directions-sms): Navigation on any phone
- [Voice AI Assistant](https://lightfriend.ai/features/voice-ai): Call an AI assistant from any phone
- [Autopilot Monitoring](https://lightfriend.ai/features/autopilot): Proactive message monitoring
- [Smart Home via SMS](https://lightfriend.ai/features/smart-home-sms): Control Home Assistant from any phone
- [QR Code Scanner](https://lightfriend.ai/features/qr-scanner): Scan QR codes from a dumbphone
- [Digital Wellness](https://lightfriend.ai/features/wellness): Screen time reduction and digital wellness tools

## For

- [ADHD & Focus](https://lightfriend.ai/for/adhd): Best phone solution for ADHD
- [Digital Detox](https://lightfriend.ai/for/digital-detox): Stay connected during your digital detox
- [Light Phone Users](https://lightfriend.ai/for/light-phone): The perfect Light Phone companion
- [Nokia Users](https://lightfriend.ai/for/nokia): Add smart features to your Nokia flip phone
- [Parents & Kids](https://lightfriend.ai/for/parents): Safe first phone solution for children
- [Business Users](https://lightfriend.ai/for/business): Professional minimalist phone setup
